question: List the names of all customers who live in London.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE city = 'London';

question: How many products are in the 'Hardware' category?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE category = 'Hardware';

question: What is the average price of all products?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(price) FROM products;

question: List the distinct countries customers come from.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM customers;

question: What is the name of the most expensive product?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List the names of the 3 most expensive products, most expensive first.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Which customers placed an order on 2024-01-10? Return their names.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.order_date = '2024-01-10';

question: What is the total quantity of the product named 'Widget' that has been ordered across all orders?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.qty) FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE p.name = 'Widget';

question: For each customer, return their name and the number of orders they have placed (include customers with zero orders).
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name;

question: Which customers have placed more than one order? Return their names.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 1;

question: List the names of customers who have never placed an order.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders);

question: How many distinct customers have placed at least one order?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders;

question: How many orders were placed in March 2024?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date LIKE '2024-03-%';

question: What is the cheapest product in the 'Hardware' category? Return its name.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE category = 'Hardware' ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total revenue across all order items (quantity multiplied by product price)?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.qty * p.price) FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id;

question: For each product category, return the category and its total revenue (quantity times price).
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.qty * p.price) FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category;

question: Which customer has spent the most in total (sum of quantity times price across their order items)? Return their name.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY SUM(oi.qty * p.price) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List the distinct product names that Alice has ordered.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.name = 'Alice';

question: List the distinct cities of customers who have ordered any product in the 'Books' category.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.city FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Books';

question: What is the total quantity ordered across all products in the 'Hardware' category?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.qty) FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Hardware';

question: For each product category, how many products in that category are priced above 8? Return the category and the count (categories with none should show 0).
gold_sql: SELECT category, COUNT(CASE WHEN price > 8 THEN 1 END) FROM products GROUP BY category;

question: Which product categories contain more than 2 products? Return the category name.
gold_sql: SELECT category FROM products GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;

question: For each customer who has placed an order, show their name and the date of their most recent order.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, o.order_date FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.order_date = (SELECT MAX(o2.order_date) FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.customer_id = c.id);

question: List the distinct product names that Carlos has ordered but Alice has not.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.name = 'Carlos' EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.name = 'Alice';

question: What is the average number of line items per order, rounded to 2 decimal places?
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cnt), 2) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id);

question: For each customer who has ordered, return their name and the number of distinct products they have ordered.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name;

question: Which customers have ordered products from more than one product category? Return their names.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) > 1;

question: Return the names of the top 2 customers by total spend (sum of quantity times product price).
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY SUM(oi.qty * p.price) DESC LIMIT 2;

question: Which product category generated the most total revenue (quantity times price)? Return the category.
gold_sql: SELECT p.category FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.qty * p.price) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List every pair of customers who live in the same city, showing both names (each pair once).
gold_sql: SELECT c1.name, c2.name FROM customers c1 JOIN customers c2 ON c1.city = c2.city AND c1.id < c2.id;

question: List the names of products priced above the average price of all products.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products);

question: For each customer who ordered any Hardware product, return their name and the total quantity of Hardware-category items they ordered.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.qty) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Hardware' GROUP BY c.id, c.name;
